curl -sk -X POST https://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/evaluate/structured \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \\
  -d @/tmp/test4.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
if 'detail' in data:
    print\('ERROR:', data['detail']\)
    sys.exit\(1\)
evals = data.get\('evaluations', []\)
print\(f'Cards returned: {len\(evals\)}  \(expected 3\)'\)
print\(f'agent_run_id:   {data.get\(\\"agent_run_id\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'evaluated_at:   {data.get\(\\"evaluated_at\\"\)}'\)
print\(\)
for card in evals:
    pm = card.get\('probability_matrix', {}\)
    print\(f'  strategy_key:      {card[\\"strategy_key\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  verdict:           {card[\\"verdict\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  score:             {card[\\"score\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  entry_price:       {card[\\"entry_price\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  max_profit:        {card[\\"max_profit\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  max_loss:          {card[\\"max_loss\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  key_risks count:   {len\(card[\\"key_risks\\"]\)}'\)
    print\(f'  invalidators:      {len\(card[\\"thesis_invalidators\\"]\)}'\)
    print\(f'  prob_matrix dates: {pm.get\(\\"dates\\", []\)}'\)
    print\(f'  claude_read:       {card[\\"claude_read\\"][:90]}...'\)
    print\(\)
print\('PASS' if len\(evals\) == 3 else 'FAIL — expected 3 cards'\)
")

import sys, asyncio

# Import the new pieces and verify they load without errors

# Verify the DB model has the index
args = SymbolContext.__table_args__
idx_names = [a.name for a in args if hasattr\(a, 'name'\)]
print\(f"  SymbolContext indexes: {idx_names}"\)
EOF)

import sys
from pathlib import Path

proj = "C:/Users/DonMishory/OneDrive - jmholistic.com/VS Code Projects/Options Analyzer/options-analyzer"
sys.path.insert\(0, proj\)
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(dotenv_path=Path\(proj\) / ".env"\)

# Verify all Stream B imports
from app.agents.position_monitor import PositionMonitorAgent, PositionHealthUpdate, AgentRunResult
from app.api.agents_routes import router, init_agents_routes
from app.skills.skill_loader import get_skill
from apscheduler.schedulers.asyncio import AsyncIOScheduler

# Verify SKILL.md loads and has the expected sections
skill = get_skill\("position-monitor"\)
sections = skill.list_sections\(\)
print\(f"position-monitor sections: {sections}"\)
assert "POSITION_MONITOR_SYSTEM" in sections, "POSITION_MONITOR_SYSTEM section missing"
assert "POSITION_MONITOR_USER" in sections, "POSITION_MONITOR_USER section missing"
print\(f"prompt_version: {skill.prompt_version}"\)

# Verify PositionHealthUpdate schema
u = PositionHealthUpdate\(
    position_id="test-id",
    health_grade="B",
    current_pnl=-45.0,
    needs_insight=False,
\)
print\(f"PositionHealthUpdate OK: grade={u.health_grade}"\)

# Verify route prefix
print\(f"agents_router prefix: {router.prefix}"\)

print\("All Stream B imports OK"\)
EOF)

    }\)
    print\(r.status_code, r.text[:200]\)
except Exception as e:

Bash(cd "/c/Users/DonMishory/OneDrive - jmholistic.com/VS Code Projects/Options Analyzer/options-analyzer" && venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import os, sys
os.environ['SKIP_AUTH'] = 'true'
os.environ['DEFAULT_MARKET_DATA_PROVIDER'] = 'tradier'
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from app.main import app

results = []

with TestClient\(app\) as client:
    r = client.post\('/api/v1/analyze/scorecard', json={'symbol': 'AAPL', 'user_config': None}\)
    d = r.json\(\) if r.status_code == 200 else {}
    strats = d.get\('strategies', []\)
    up = d.get\('underlying_price', 0\)
    non_zero = sum\(1 for s in strats if s.get\('score', 0\) > 0\)
    ok = r.status_code == 200 and len\(strats\) == 4 and up > 0
    results.append\(\('[2.9 T1] scorecard AAPL', ok, f'status={r.status_code} strats={len\(strats\)} price={up:.2f} non_zero={non_zero}'\)\)

    r2 = client.post\('/api/v1/analyze/probability-matrix', json={'symbol': 'AAPL', 'current_price': max\(up, 200\), 'iv': 0.25, 'dte': 30}\)
    d2 = r2.json\(\) if r2.status_code == 200 else {}
    pl = d2.get\('price_levels', []\)
    dts = d2.get\('dates', []\)
    mx = d2.get\('matrix', []\)
    probs_ok = all\(0 <= p <= 1 for row in mx for p in row\) if mx else False
    ok2 = r2.status_code == 200 and len\(pl\) > 0 and len\(dts\) == 4 and probs_ok
    results.append\(\('[2.9 T2] prob-matrix', ok2, f'status={r2.status_code} levels={len\(pl\)} dates={len\(dts\)}'\)\)

    r3 = client.post\('/api/v1/evaluate/trade', json={}\)
    results.append\(\('[2.11 T1] /evaluate/trade 410', r3.status_code == 410, f'status={r3.status_code}'\)\)

    r4 = client.post\('/api/v1/evaluate/follow-up', json={}\)
    results.append\(\('[2.11 T2] /evaluate/follow-up 410', r4.status_code == 410, f'status={r4.status_code}'\)\)

    r5 = client.get\('/api/v1/positions/'\)
    ok5 = r5.status_code == 200
    d5 = r5.json\(\) if ok5 else {}
    results.append\(\('[2.10 T1] GET /positions/', ok5, f'status={r5.status_code} count={d5.get\(\\"count\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\)\)

    r6 = client.get\('/api/v1/positions/aggregate'\)
    ok6 = r6.status_code == 200
    d6 = r6.json\(\) if ok6 else {}
    results.append\(\('[2.10 T2] GET /positions/aggregate', ok6, f'status={r6.status_code} keys={list\(d6.keys\(\)\)[:4]}'\)\)

    r7 = client.post\('/api/v1/analyze/scorecard', json={'symbol': 'SPY', 'user_config': None}\)
    d7 = r7.json\(\) if r7.status_code == 200 else {}
    ok7 = r7.status_code == 200 and len\(d7.get\('strategies', []\)\) == 4
    results.append\(\('[2.9 T3] scorecard SPY', ok7, f'status={r7.status_code} price={d7.get\(\\"underlying_price\\",0\):.2f}'\)\)

passed = sum\(1 for _, ok, _ in results if ok\)
total = len\(results\)
print\(\)
print\(f'=== RESULTS {passed}/{total} ==='\)
for label, ok, detail in results:
    print\(f'  {\\"PASS\\" if ok else \\"FAIL\\"} {label} -- {detail}'\)
" 2>&1 | grep -E "^=== |^  \(PASS|FAIL\)")
